page_metadata.biotools__summary: The tool finds the Knobs-into-Holes mode of packing between alpha-helices which is characteristic of coiled coils. It unambiguously defines the beginning and end of coiled-coil motifs in protein structures and assigns a heptad register to the sequence, highlighting the core-residues with a RasMol script if required.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The tool finds the Knobs-into-Holes mode of packing between alpha-helices which is characteristic of coiled coils.
